data.title: 20 Crypto Hacks Occurred in February, Losing About $1.51 Billion
data.description: According to PeckShieldAlert, there were 20 cryptocurrency hacker attacks in February, resulting in a loss of approximately $1.51 billion, making it the most loss-making month in the history of cryptocurrency. The Bybit incident alone lost $1.43 billion, ranking first in the list of the largest intrusion incidents in the past five years.

data.title: Judge Tosses SEC’s Case Against Richard Heart—But He Remains on the Run
data.description:
A U.S. district judge has dismissed the SEC’s lawsuit against Hex founder Richard Heart, citing lack of jurisdiction, but Heart still faces legal troubles in Finland.

The post Judge Tosses SEC’s Case Against Richard Heart—But He Remains on the Run first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/01/sec-drops-case-against-richard-heart/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sec-drops-case-against-richard-heart
